title: Creamy Uruguayan Avocado Tartare
description: This tangy, gooey dish features lemon juice and is both energizing and plant-based-friendly.
instructions: Prepare the avocado by removing it from its skin and pitting. Scoop out about half of the flesh into a mixing bowl.
Add lemon juice, finely chopped shallot, capers, and salt to the avocado mixture. Mix well.
Fold in roughly chopped cilantro leaves until combined evenly.
Slowly add olive oil while continuously mixing with a whisk or fork to create a smooth, creamy sauce.
Transfer the mixture into a serving dish, ensuring it’s evenly spread out.
Drizzle more olive oil over the top for added shine and flavor. Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
